dialogue_text: or perhaps they won't walk the way I want to go! Let me see: I'll give them a new pair of boots every Christmas.
source_excerpt: "Curiouser and curiouser!" cried Alice (she was so much surprised, that for the moment she quite forgot how to speak good English); "now I'm opening out like the largest telescope that ever was! Good-bye, feet!" (for when she looked down...
